name: Patty Pan Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 large squash, scallop, sliced 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice patty pan or scalloped squash into 1/4-inch-thick slices.
2. Lightly salt the slices and let them sit for at least an hour before preparing the dish to reduce water content.
3. Drain the squash slices.
4. Spray a 1 1/2 quart square baking dish lightly with Pam-type spray.
5. Layer the sliced squash in the baking dish.
6. Spoon spaghetti sauce over the squash.
7. Top with cottage cheese, and sprinkle mozzarella and parmesan cheeses.
8. Repeat steps 5-7, ending with the cheeses on top.
9. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
